meaning: n.[语] 后缀,下标vt.添后缀
examples: Some terms involved in the process of morphologization don't have clear definitions, such as prefix, suffix, preclitic, enclitic, etc.
Otherwise, the suffix will not be added.
Planets orbiting stars beyond the sun are labelled merely with the name of the star and a suffix letter.
The UK suggested the proposals be rejected in favour of a third submission for the suffix from the International Rugby Board.
